observations.summary: review-code timed out (rc:124) after launching 3 review subagents but before collecting or triaging their findings; the salvaged output was mid-stream narration ('Now I'll launch all three review subagents in parallel'), not a completion message, yet the step was classified as success/COMPLETE — no code review findings were produced, no patches applied, and no Review Findings section exists in the story file.
observations.evidence: runner-errors.jsonl line 18: {"ts":"2026-07-14T12:12:01Z","source":"opencode-runner","context":"Code review (4.10) / initial run","rc":124,"salvagedOutput":"yes"}. Journal step_end for review-code (status: success, durationMs: 5402195, halts: 0, outcomeHistory: ["COMPLETE"], responseExcerpt: 'Good — 689 lines of diff. Now I\'ll launch all three review subagents in parallel: Blind Hunter (diff only), Edge Case Hunter (diff + project access), and Acceptance Auditor (diff + spec + context).'). traces/4.10-a1-20260714T095709/review-code.json — narrative (12 of 70 parts) ends at the same mid-stream message; --include machinery shows [tool: task] running x3 after this message (subagents were launched); --subagents shows all 3 child sessions report 'no narrative in final step'. review-code.manifest.json: 3 subagent sessions recorded. grep of story file _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/4-10-configure-database-backups-and-verify-restore.md for 'Review Findings' returns no matches — only an 'NFR Evidence Audit Review' section exists (from review-nfrs, not review-code). observations.summary: The 4.8 hypothesized observation is confirmed: review-tests found 35 stale transitional markers across 24 files that 4.6 reported as 0 and 4.8 reported as 3 — all markers existed during those prior runs, confirming the agent's search execution varies in thoroughness despite correct prompt language.
observations.evidence: _bmad-output/test-artifacts/test-review-validation-report.md:119-146 — 35 markers across 24 files from Stories 1.3 through 5.5 (agent-be *.spec.ts and web *.test.tsx files). Journal step_end for review-tests: '35 found across 24 files — All fixed directly.' traces/4.10-a1-20260714T095709/review-tests.json --grep 'marker' (27 of 287 parts) shows the agent searched 131 test files (11 *.test.ts, 30 *.test.tsx, 59 *.spec.ts, 31 E2E *.spec.ts) and systematically fixed all markers. Ledger entry 160 (4.8, hypothesized): 'The 4.3 update_step fixed the prompt language directing comprehensive search, but the agent\'s actual search execution varies in thoroughness across runs — 4.6 claimed comprehensive coverage but missed markers that existed during its run.' 4.6 ledger entry (line 146): 'review-tests found 0 stale transitional markers for the first time in 10+ stories.' 4.8 ledger entry (line 154): 'the 3 markers found by review-tests are from earlier stories (2.5, SPIKE, sse-back-pressure).' The 35 markers found in 4.10 include those same 3 files plus 32 more that existed during 4.6 and 4.8 runs. Playbook review-tests prompt (updatedAt: 2026-07-14T00:00:00.000Z) says 'Search all test directories in the project and all test file types (including component test files), not just the story\'s own test files.'

observations.summary: The 4.3 update_step to implement-story is working for the current story's test files (4.10's db-restore.spec.ts is clean with no transitional markers), but 35 markers from prior stories (1.3-5.5, all pre-4.3 update_step) persist in the codebase because review-tests' search is inconsistent across runs — the root cause has shifted from implement-story (now working) to review-tests (search scope inconsistency confirmed above).
observations.evidence: _bmad-output/test-artifacts/test-review-validation-report.md:75-76 — 'db-restore.spec.ts has no test.skip() / it.skip() markers — PASS. No RED-PHASE / SCAFFOLD header markers — PASS.' Journal step_end for implement-story: 'Removed RED-PHASE SCAFFOLD transitional marker from header.' _bmad-output/test-artifacts/test-review-validation-report.md:114-116 — 31 GREEN PHASE / TDD GREEN PHASE markers and 2 'test.skip() markers have been removed' comments fixed by review-tests across 24 files from Stories 1.3-5.5. All 35 markers are from stories that ran before the 4.3 update_step (applied 2026-07-12T15:50:56); stories 5.1-5.5 ran before 4.1-4.10 per storyAttempts ordering. Playbook implement-story prompt (updatedAt: 2026-07-12T15:50:56.335Z) includes 'remove all transitional phase markers from test-file headers and test planning artifacts (such as ATDD checklists) — any comment, header, or status line that describes a TDD phase transition (whether claiming tests are skipped, disabled, in a red-phase, or in a green-phase state) must be removed entirely rather than relabeled.' Ledger entries 146 (4.6, deduced non-recurrence), 154 (4.8, deduced non-recurrence) confirm the update_step is working for current-story files.

observations.summary: prepare-tests created a test scaffold with a buggy credential-isolation regex and a missing Bearer token guard — both already fixed in the sibling test custom-domain-setup.spec.ts during Story 4.9's code review — because prepare-tests did not consult sibling test files for corrected guard patterns; validate-story-2 caught both issues and added subtasks 2.5 and 2.6 to fix them.
observations.evidence: Journal step_end for validate-story-2: 'Critical Issue 1: Connection-string regex bug — db-restore.spec.ts uses [^@]+ for the password field in 4 connection-string regex assertions (lines 279, 299, 321, 333). This requires 1+ characters for the password, so postgresql://user:@host (empty password) passes the guard undetected. This exact bug was identified and fixed in the sibling test custom-domain-setup.spec.ts during the Story 4.9 code review (deferred-work.md line 116: Fix: [^@]*).' 'Critical Issue 2: Missing Bearer token guard — the sibling test custom-domain-setup.spec.ts has this guard (line 190-194), using the fixed regex from the 4.9 review.' traces/4.10-a1-20260714T095709/prepare-tests.json — --grep for 'custom-domain|sibling|bearer|Bearer|[^@]' returns 0 matches across 242 parts; --grep for 'CREDENTIAL' returns 2 matches (the prompt text and the final summary mentioning 'credential-isolation guards (5 tests, 7 CREDENTIAL_ENV_VARS)') — the agent never mentioned consulting the sibling test. Journal step_end for prepare-tests: '44 test.skip() test blocks covering... credential-isolation guards (5 tests, 7 CREDENTIAL_ENV_VARS), input-injection guards (5 tests), and curl flags (2 tests).' Story file lines 69, 71: subtasks 2.5 and 2.6 added by validate-story-2 to fix the regex and add the Bearer guard. Ledger entries 39 (3.8, hypothesized), 48 (3.10, confirmed), 4.6 (2026-07-13T11:15:48.881Z, confirmed) record prior occurrences; trends show 10 distinct runs.
